---
title: " "
title-block-banner: false
---

<div class="hero-title">

<h1>Computational Estimation of Eyewitness Reliability</h1>

<p class="hero-subtitle">
A research programme integrating memory science, decision science, and computational modelling to develop scientifically grounded methods for estimating eyewitness reliability and communicating uncertainty within legal decision-making contexts.
</p>

</div>

<div class="challenge-box">

### Grand Challenge

**How can eyewitness reliability be quantified, estimated, and communicated?**

This programme addresses the challenge of moving from qualitative judgments about eyewitness evidence towards calibrated, interpretable, and empirically grounded estimates of reliability.

</div>

<div class="figure-wrapper">
  <img src="images/programmeOverview.png" alt="Overview of the eyewitness reliability research programme">
</div>

<h2>Research at a Glance</h2>

<div class="glance-grid">

<div class="glance-card">
<div class="glance-number">1</div>
<div class="glance-label">Published Article</div>
</div>

<div class="glance-card">
<div class="glance-number">2</div>
<div class="glance-label">Papers Under Review</div>
</div>

<div class="glance-card">
<div class="glance-number">2</div>
<div class="glance-label">Papers in Development</div>
</div>

<div class="glance-card">
<div class="glance-number">6</div>
<div class="glance-label">Research Themes</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="vision-box">

<h3>Research Programme Roadmap</h3>

<p>
The programme progresses from foundational science on memory, confidence, and evidence diagnosticity, through predictive computational modelling and ecological validation, towards practical applications within the justice system.
</p>

<p>
<a href="programme.html">View the full research programme →</a>
</p>

</div>

<div class="button-row">
  <a class="homepage-button" href="programme.html">Research Programme</a>
  <a class="homepage-button" href="projects.html">Projects</a>
  <a class="homepage-button" href="publications.html">Publications</a>
</div>
